title: ArgoCD ApplicationSet app-config
description: Configuration file consumed by ArgoCD ApplicationSets to generate ArgoCD Application resources.

enabled.description: Whether this application should be deployed. The ApplicationSet selector only processes entries with "true".

namespace.description: The Kubernetes namespace where the application will be deployed. The namespace is created automatically if it does not exist.

appSubfolder.description: Optional subdirectory within the app path. Used for multi-component apps (e.g. rook-ceph/operator, rook-ceph/cluster) where each entry deploys from a different subfolder.

syncPolicy.description: Controls ArgoCD automated sync behaviour for this application.

enabled.description: Enable ArgoCD automated sync. When false, syncs must be triggered manually.

selfHeal.description: When true, ArgoCD will automatically revert manual changes made directly to the cluster (drift correction).

prune.description: When true, ArgoCD will delete Kubernetes resources that are no longer present in Git during a sync.

managedNamespaceMetadata.description: Labels and/or annotations to apply to the managed namespace. Requires CreateNamespace=true in syncOptions (already set globally).

labels.description: Key/value labels to add to the namespace. Common use: pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: privileged.

annotations.description: Key/value annotations to add to the namespace.

plugin.description: ArgoCD Config Management Plugin (CMP) configuration. Used to enable the argocd-secret-replacer plugin which substitutes <secret:key> tokens at sync time.

env.description: Environment variables passed to the CMP plugin.

name.description: Environment variable name. Use SECRET_PROVIDER to activate the secret-replacer plugin.

value.description: Environment variable value. Set to "cluster-secrets" to enable <secret:key> token substitution from the cluster-secrets K8s Secret.

ignoreDifferences.description: List of resource fields that ArgoCD should ignore when comparing live cluster state with Git. Useful for fields mutated by controllers (e.g. Ceph, Prometheus operators).

items.description: A single ignore-differences rule targeting a specific resource or field path.

group.description: API group of the resource (e.g. "apps", "ceph.rook.io"). Leave empty for core API group resources like ConfigMap and Secret.

name.description: Optional: only apply this rule to a resource with this specific name. Omit to match all resources of this kind.

namespace.description: Optional: only apply this rule to resources in this namespace.

jsonPointers.description: JSON Pointer paths (RFC 6901) to ignore. Mutually exclusive with jqPathExpressions in practice, but both can be present.

items.description: A JSON Pointer path, e.g. "/data/ca.crt" or "/spec/replicas".

jqPathExpressions.description: jq path expressions to ignore. More flexible than jsonPointers — supports wildcards and filters.
